titleStmt.title: SII 22.333: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 333. (A.R. No. 333 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—10th YEAR (A.D. 994-95)

summary.p: This records an endowment of 20 kaḻañju of gold by Arunilai Śrīkṛishṇaṉ alias Mūvēnda Piḍavūrvēḷār the accountant of Piḍavūr-nāḍu in Śōḻanāḍu, which was invested with the Ūrār of Vēḷkaḷa Veṇpākkam adjacent to (?) Gōvindapāḍi. The three kaḻañju collected from them as interest every year was to be utilised by the trustees of the temple, for the recitation of the Tiruppadiyam hymn beginning with the expression [kōla]naṟkuḻal composed (?) by the donor's father Kāyāvāṉ Arunilai, on the seventh day of the annual festival in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kāntaḷūrcālai kalamaṟutta
korājarājakesaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10- ttāvatu tāma
tu tāmarṉāṭṭu śrī govin=tapāṭi puṟattu veḷkaḷa veṇpā
roṅkaiyeḻuttu coḻaṉāṭṭu vaṭakaraip piṭavūrnāṭṭuk kaṇakku
ṭaiyāṉ Arunilai śrīkṛṣṇaṉāṉa muventappiṭavūr ve
ḷār kaiyāl yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava cempoṉ tanma ka
ṭṭaḷaiyāl tuḷai 2 10 Ippoṉ koṇṭa paricāvatu Ivāṭṭai
puraṭṭātimutal kaḻañcinvāy tiṅkaḷiraṇṭumāp policaiyā lorāṭ
ṭaikku vanta pon 3� Ippoṉṉilivar tamappaṉār kāyāvā naruṉilaiyā
ṉa muventappiṭavūr veḷār śrī govin=tapāṭi Āḻvāṉ viṇṇappam ce
kola naṟkuḻaleṉum tiruppatiyam Ivāḷvār tiruviḻāvi ṉeḻāṉāḷāl
ṭiyāṭiṉa paridaināyakaṉmārkku Irukaḻañcuṅ keṭppicca koyil nampimārkku
kaḻañcum Āka policai mukkaḻañcu poṉṉum śantrādittaval Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟumā
ḷvār śrī kāryañ ceykiṉṟa nampimāre taṇṭi Iṭuvippatākavum Iṭomākil
tiruvāṇaimaṟaiyum paṭṭu tevakanmikaḷ tāṅkaḷ ve ttil tāṅkaḷ veṇṭu
taṇṭamiṭap peṟuvārkaḷākavum mivarkaḷiṭṭa taṇṭamiṟuttum Iṉṉivanta mippaṭi
Iṭakkaṭavomākavum Ipparicoṭṭi Iṭṭukkuṭutto muventappiṭavūr veḷārkku
veḷkaḷaveṇpākkatturom Ūrār paṇikka Iśilālekai veṭṭi ṉeṉ
Āṟaiyāṉa śrī govin=tapāṭi Ācāriyaneṉ Ivai yeṉ Eḻuttu I
tu śrī vaiṣṇavar(ri)rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.333 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
